                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.FlowNestingInvIx_setNeedIndentCheck_false {input : String} {s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input} (h : FlowNestingInvIx s) :
                      FlowNestingInvIx { cursor := s.cursor, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := false, allowDirectives := s.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := s.documentEverStarted, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors, comments := s.comments }

                      FlowNestingInvIx is preserved by the needIndentCheck := false setter (the record update doesn't change tokens or flowLevel). Added 6f.3b2.pre to bridge the scanNextTokenIx_preprocess unwind branch, where Step 6f.0's reshape now wraps the unwound state in { ... with needIndentCheck := false }.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_preprocess_preserves_FlowNestingInvIx {input : String} (s s1 : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_preprocess = Except.ok (some (s1, c))) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) :
                      FlowNestingInvIx s1

                      §11h scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent preservation — proven #

                      (Step 6d.1e.11d, Reflection 88)

                      Discharge strategy: case-split on the 7 dispatcher arms following the scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent_ok_monotonic template:

                      • arms 1-2 (&, *): scanAnchorOrAliasIx_preserves_*
                      • arm 3 (!): scanTagIx_preserves_*
                      • arms 4-6 (|/>, ", '): emitAt_non_plain_preserves_* / emitAt_non_flow_preserves_* (the new tokens are .scalar _ .literal|.folded|.doubleQuoted|.singleQuoted — non-plain, non-flow)
                      • arm 7 (plain): the new token is .scalar content .plain. Use scanPlainScalarIx_content_valid (Layer F.5, discharged in 6d.1e.11c) to derive ScalarScannable content s.inFlow, then:
                        • for PSV (_ false): apply ScalarScannable_any_implies_false;
                        • for FCPSV (_ true at flow-nesting positions): use FlowNestingInvIx s + flowNestingIx_prefix_stable to convert flowNestingIx new_tokens (s.tokens.size) > 0 to s.inFlow = true, so ScalarScannable content s.inFlow IS ScalarScannable content true;
                        • for FNI: the new token is non-flow (.scalar ...), so emitAt_non_flow_preserves_FlowNestingInvIx closes.

                      The plain arm requires:

                      1. h_peek : s.cursor.peek? = some c — threaded through §11i via the new scanNextTokenIx_preprocess_peek_eq helper;
                      2. FlowNestingInvIx s — added as a hypothesis to the FCPSV trio member and threaded through §11i/§11j FCPSV chains.

                      Both threading changes are scoped to this §11h trio + their direct consumers in §11i and §11j FCPSV.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_preprocess_peek_eq {input : String} {s s1 : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input} {c : Char} (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_preprocess = Except.ok (some (s1, c))) :
                      s1.cursor.peek? = some c

                      Helper: scanNextTokenIx_preprocess returns (s1, c) exactly when s1.cursor.peek? = some c. The character c is the value matched by the final match s.peek? with | some c => .ok (some (s, c)) arm, so the output state's cursor peeks at it. Used by the §11h dispatcher's plain arm to discharge the canStart witness for scanPlainScalarIx_content_valid.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.allowDirectives_update_cursor {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      (if s.allowDirectives = true then { cursor := s.cursor, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors, comments := s.comments } else s).cursor = s.cursor

                      Helper: the if s.allowDirectives then ... else s record update preserves .cursor.

                      source
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanBlockScalarIx_style_not_plain {input : String} {c : Indexed.IxCursor input} {parentIndent : Nat} {content : String} {style : ScalarStyle} {cAfter : Indexed.IxCursor input} (h : Scanner.Indexed.scanBlockScalarIx c parentIndent = some (content, style, cAfter)) :
                      style ≠ ScalarStyle.plain

                      Helper: scanBlockScalarIx only emits .literal or .folded.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.emitAt_plain_preserves_PlainScalarsValidIx_of_scannable {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (startPos : YamlPos) (content : String) (hOrder : startPos.offset ≤ s.cursor.pos.offset) (h_old : WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx s.tokens) (h_ss : Grammar.ScalarScannable { content := content, style := ScalarStyle.plain } false) :
                      WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx (s.emitAt startPos (YamlToken.scalar content ScalarStyle.plain) hOrder).tokens

                      emitAt of a .scalar content .plain token preserves PlainScalarsValidIx given a scannability witness for the content at inFlow = false.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.emitAt_plain_preserves_FlowContextPSVIx_of_scannable {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (startPos : YamlPos) (content : String) (hOrder : startPos.offset ≤ s.cursor.pos.offset) (h_old : WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx s.tokens) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) (h_ss : s.flowLevel > 0 → Grammar.ScalarScannable { content := content, style := ScalarStyle.plain } true) :
                      WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx (s.emitAt startPos (YamlToken.scalar content ScalarStyle.plain) hOrder).tokens

                      emitAt of a .scalar content .plain token preserves FlowContextPSVIx given:

                      1. FlowNestingInvIx s to bridge flowNestingIx new_tokens j > 0 to s.flowLevel > 0;
                      2. a conditional scannability witness for the content at inFlow = true.
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent_preserves_PlainScalarsValidIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent c = Except.ok s') (h_peek : s.cursor.peek? = some c) (h_old : WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx s.tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx s'.tokens

                      Dispatch-content preservation for PlainScalarsValidIx. (Step 6d.1e.11d) — 7-arm case split on the dispatcher's if c == X cascade. Arms 1-6 (non-plain emits) discharge via scanAnchorOrAliasIx_* / scanTagIx_* / emitAt_non_plain_*. The plain arm composes scanPlainScalarIx_content_valid with ScalarScannable_any_implies_false to weaken to _ false.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent_preserves_FlowContextPSVIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent c = Except.ok s') (h_peek : s.cursor.peek? = some c) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) (h_old : WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx s.tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx s'.tokens

                      Dispatch-content preservation for FlowContextPSVIx. (Step 6d.1e.11d) — requires FlowNestingInvIx s to bridge flowNestingIx new_tokens (s.tokens.size) > 0 to s.flowLevel > 0 in the plain arm.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent_preserves_FlowNestingInvIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent c = Except.ok s') (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) :
                      FlowNestingInvIx s'

                      Dispatch-content preservation for FlowNestingInvIx. (Step 6d.1e.11d) — all 7 dispatcher arms emit non-flow tokens.

                      §11i scanNextTokenIx preservation — proven (Step 6d.1e.9) #

                      Top-level composition over preprocess + dispatchStructural + dispatchFlowIndicators + dispatchBlockIndicators + dispatchContent

                      • allowDirectives/checkBlockFlowIndent record updates.

                      Discharge strategy (Step 6d.1e.9, Reflection 77): chain generalize h_layer : f_layer s = res at h_ok + cases res with | error => simp at h_ok | ok inner => cases inner with ... per dispatcher layer (preprocess → dispatchStructural → checkBlockFlowIndent → dispatchFlowIndicators → dispatchBlockIndicators → dispatchContent). cases pair with | mk s_pp c cleanly extracts pair components without hitting Reflection 73's ScannerStateIx over-destructure. The if s_pp.allowDirectives then ... else s_pp record update is abstracted via a separate generalize h_dir_def : ... = s_dir at h_ok because Lean 4 core lacks Mathlib's set tactic. The two helper lemmas allowDirectives_update_tokens / _flowLevel then close the preservation obligation for s_dir. Each step's error branch is closed by simp at h_ok (iota-reduces the match then closes via reduceCtorEq); each step's success branch carries the named equation hypothesis into the corresponding §11e–§11h dispatcher preservation lemma.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.allowDirectives_update_tokens {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      (if s.allowDirectives = true then { cursor := s.cursor, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors, comments := s.comments } else s).tokens = s.tokens

                      Helper: the if s.allowDirectives then ... else s record update preserves .tokens.

                      source
                      📐 coverage

                      (if s.allowDirectives = true then { cursor := s.cursor, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors, comments := s.comments } else s).flowLevel = s.flowLevel

                      Helper: the if s.allowDirectives then ... else s record update preserves flowLevel.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.allowDirectives_update_simpleKey {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      (if s.allowDirectives = true then { cursor := s.cursor, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors, comments := s.comments } else s).simpleKey = s.simpleKey

                      Helper: the if s.allowDirectives then ... else s record update preserves simpleKey.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.allowDirectives_update_SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_inv : SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx s) :
                      SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx (if s.allowDirectives = true then { cursor := s.cursor, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors, comments := s.comments } else s)

                      Helper: the if s.allowDirectives then ... else s record update preserves SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx (tokens and simpleKey are both unchanged).

                      Note (Step 6d.1e.12d): the two SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx- preservation axioms previously declared here (_preprocess_preserves_* and scanNextTokenIx_preserves_*) were discharged by routing the consumer chain (§11i _FlowContextPSVIx/_FlowNestingInvIx, §11j scanLoopIx_preserves_*, §11k top-level theorems) through the §12l AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx dispatcher composition. The refactored consumers live in §13 (after §12l, which they depend on); §11i below retains only _PlainScalarsValidIx.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_preserves_PlainScalarsValidIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_old : WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx s.tokens) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx = Except.ok (some s')) :
                      WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx s'.tokens

                      Note (Step 6d.1e.12d): scanNextTokenIx_preserves_FlowContextPSVIx and _FlowNestingInvIx previously lived here as theorems taking h_pl : SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx s. They were refactored in 12d to take h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s (the 4-tuple from §6e+, composed across the dispatcher chain in §12l) and moved to §13.

                      §11j scanLoopIx_preserves_* — real theorems via structural #

                      induction on fuel, with a final-emit .streamEnd step preservation lemma chained on top of §11i's scanNextTokenIx_preserves_*.

                      This is the shape lemma the Phase 3 closure (§9) needs: applied at the post-init state with the initial-emit invariant established, scanLoopIx_preserves_FlowNestingInvIx discharges scan_flow_brackets_matched_ix_axiom, and the other two discharge scan_flow_aware_psv_ix_axiom's two conjuncts.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.finalEmit_preserves_PlainScalarsValidIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_old : WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx s.tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx ((s.unwindIndentsIx (-1)).emit YamlToken.streamEnd).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.finalEmit_preserves_FlowContextPSVIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_old : WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx s.tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx ((s.unwindIndentsIx (-1)).emit YamlToken.streamEnd).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.finalEmit_preserves_FlowNestingInvIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) :
                      FlowNestingInvIx ((s.unwindIndentsIx (-1)).emit YamlToken.streamEnd)
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanLoopIx_preserves_PlainScalarsValidIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (fuel : Nat) (tokens : Indexed.TokenStream input) (h_old : WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx s.tokens) (h_ok : s.scanLoopIx fuel = Except.ok tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx tokens

                      Note (Step 6d.1e.12d): scanLoopIx_preserves_FlowContextPSVIx and _FlowNestingInvIx were refactored to take h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s (instead of h_pl) and moved to §13 (they depend on §12l's dispatcher composition).

                      §11k Initial-state invariants + §9 axiom discharge #

                      Initial-state mk'_* lemmas live here; the top-level theorems (scan_flow_aware_psv_ix_axiom / scan_flow_brackets_matched_ix_axiom) were moved to §13 in Step 6d.1e.12d (they now establish AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx at the initial state and thread it through the refactored scanLoopIx_preserves_* chain).

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.mk'_PlainScalarsValidIx (input : String) :
                      WellBehaved.PlainScalarsValidIx (Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx.mk' input).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.mk'_FlowContextPSVIx (input : String) :
                      WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx (Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx.mk' input).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.mk'_FlowNestingInvIx (input : String) :
                      FlowNestingInvIx (Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx.mk' input)

                      Note (Step 6d.1e.12d): streamStart_SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx is subsumed by streamStart_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx in §13, which powers the refactored top-level theorems scan_flow_aware_psv_ix_axiom and scan_flow_brackets_matched_ix_axiom (also moved to §13).

                      §12 Per-scanner simpleKey / simpleKeyStack facts (Step 6d.1e.12b) #

                      Indexed mirrors of the legacy _preserves_simpleKey / _preserves_simpleKeyStack / _clears_simpleKey / _simpleKey_cleared / _simpleKey_restored / _stack_pushed / _stack_popped chain (legacy lives in Proofs/Scanner/ ScannerCorrectness.lean lines 2924–5870). These are pure state-projection facts: most reduce to rfl because the indexed operations advance / emit / emitAt / advanceN / overwriteAtCursor / skipToContentS use record-update syntax that preserves all non-mentioned fields definitionally. The remaining helpers (unwindIndentsLoopIx, saveSimpleKeyIx, the per-scanner facts) compose these primitives. Step 12c (next) uses the per-scanner facts plus the _mono helpers from §6e+ to thread AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx across the dispatcher composition.

                      §12a State-level primitives #

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      @[simp]
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.advance_preserves_simpleKey {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.advance.simpleKey = s.simpleKey
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      @[simp]

                      s.advance.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

                      (s.advanceN n).simpleKey = s.simpleKey

                      (s.emit tok).simpleKey = s.simpleKey

                      §12b Indent-stack helpers #

                      unwindIndentsLoopIx recurses on fuel, emitting blockEnd and popping indents — neither touches simpleKey / simpleKeyStack. pushSequenceIndentIx / pushMappingIndentIx likewise only emit and push to indents.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.unwindIndentsLoopIx_preserves_simpleKey {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (col : Int) (fuel : Nat) :
                      (s.unwindIndentsLoopIx col fuel).simpleKey = s.simpleKey
                      source

                      (s.unwindIndentsLoopIx col fuel).simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

                      §12c saveSimpleKeyIx helpers #

                      saveSimpleKeyIx either no-ops or emits two placeholders and sets simpleKey with possible := true. In all branches simpleKeyStack is unchanged.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.saveSimpleKeyIx_preserves_simpleKeyStack {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.saveSimpleKeyIx.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

                      §12d Block-context scanner facts #

                      scanDocumentStartIx, scanDocumentEndIx, scanDirectiveIx, scanBlockEntryIx, scanKeyIx, scanValueClearKeyIx, scanValuePrepareIx, scanValueIx, scanAnchorOrAliasIx, scanTagIx.

                      s.scanDocumentStartIx.simpleKey.possible = false

                      §12e Flow-context start/end facts #

                      scanFlowSequenceStartIx / scanFlowMappingStartIx clear the current simpleKey and push the old one onto simpleKeyStack. scanFlowSequenceEndIx / scanFlowMappingEndIx restore the top of the stack into simpleKey and pop. scanFlowEntryIx calls scanValuePrepareIx (clears) + emit + advance.

                      source
                      ⬆️ coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowSequenceStartIx_simpleKey_cleared {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowSequenceStartIx.simpleKey.possible = false
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowSequenceStartIx_stack_pushed {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowSequenceStartIx.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.push s.simpleKey
                      source
                      ⬆️ coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowMappingStartIx_simpleKey_cleared {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowMappingStartIx.simpleKey.possible = false
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowMappingStartIx_stack_pushed {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowMappingStartIx.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.push s.simpleKey
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowSequenceEndIx_simpleKey_restored {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowSequenceEndIx.simpleKey = s.simpleKeyStack.back?.getD { }
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowSequenceEndIx_stack_popped {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowSequenceEndIx.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.pop
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowMappingEndIx_simpleKey_restored {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowMappingEndIx.simpleKey = s.simpleKeyStack.back?.getD { }
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowMappingEndIx_stack_popped {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowMappingEndIx.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.pop
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowEntryIx_preserves_simpleKey {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h : s.scanFlowEntryIx = Except.ok s') :
                      s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKey

                      After Step 6f.0, scanFlowEntryIx preserves (does NOT clear) simpleKey: the , boundary doesn't retroactively confirm the pending simple key. Indexed twin of legacy scanFlowEntry_preserves_simpleKey.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowEntryIx_preserves_simpleKeyStack {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h : s.scanFlowEntryIx = Except.ok s') :
                      s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack

                      §12f Per-scanner _tokens_eq rfl-bridges (Step 6d.1e.12c-scout) #

                      Indexed twins of legacy scan*_preserves_prefix infrastructure. The full per-scanner _preserves_prefix Ix family encounters a recurring motive-not-type-correct wall when Lean's record-update notation ({ unwindIndentsIx s c with simpleKey := … }) elaborates as let __src := …; { __src with … } and the (stateExpr).tokens[i]'_ access carries the dependent bound proof through the rewrite motive — rw [scanX_tokens_eq] and rw [emit_preserves_tokens_at …] both fail with motive errors, and change over the same patterns fails to unify across the __src let-zeta.

                      The _tokens_eq rfl-bridges below establish that each scanner's .tokens field equals a clean (... .emit tok).tokens form modulo record-update opacity — these compile (verified) and are the right primitives for §12c-dispatchers. The full _preserves_prefix lemmas that turn these into indexed accesses are deferred to a substrate-fix follow-up step (12c.1: prefix infrastructure; 12c.2: dispatcher composition; 12c.3: discharge the 2 staging axioms).

                      See Reflection 91 in the Blueprint for the substrate-fix detail.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowSequenceStartIx_tokens_eq {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowSequenceStartIx.tokens = (s.emit YamlToken.flowSequenceStart).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowSequenceEndIx_tokens_eq {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowSequenceEndIx.tokens = (s.emit YamlToken.flowSequenceEnd).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowMappingStartIx_tokens_eq {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowMappingStartIx.tokens = (s.emit YamlToken.flowMappingStart).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowMappingEndIx_tokens_eq {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanFlowMappingEndIx.tokens = (s.emit YamlToken.flowMappingEnd).tokens
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanDocumentStartIx_tokens_eq {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.scanDocumentStartIx.tokens = ((s.unwindIndentsIx (-1)).emit YamlToken.documentStart).tokens

                      §12g Per-scanner _preserves_prefix — flow indicators #

                      (Step 6d.1e.12c.1)

                      The substrate fix for the _preserves_prefix family. Each lemma mirrors the legacy unwindIndentsLoopIx_preserves_prefix / pushSequenceIndentIx_preserves_prefix shape with both bound proofs explicit, deriving the LHS bound from the matching _tokens_size_le lemma (from Proofs/Scanner/IndexedDispatch.lean) and closing the conclusion via show reshaping + the §5/§6 primitives (emit_preserves_tokens_at, emitAt_preserves_tokens_at).

                      This deliberately avoids the _tokens_eq rfl-bridges from §12f and the rw [scanX_tokens_eq] rewrite pattern that triggered the motive-not-type-correct wall (Reflection 91). The show tactic reshapes through definitional equality only — record-update opacity and let __src zeta-reduction succeed silently.

                      source
                      📐 coverage

                      §12h Per-scanner _preserves_prefix — block content scanners #

                      (Step 6d.1e.12c.1)

                      scanBlockEntryIx and scanKeyIx emit .blockEntry / .key tokens, optionally after pushSequenceIndentIx / pushMappingIndentIx in block context. Both pushXIndentIx already have _preserves_prefix lemmas (§6d/§6e).

                      source
                      📐 coverage

                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanKeyIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanKeyIx = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

                      §12i Per-scanner _preserves_prefix — directive scanners #

                      (Step 6d.1e.12c.1)

                      scanYamlDirectiveIx, scanTagDirectiveIx emit at startPos via emitAt, then update non-tokens fields. scanDirectiveIx delegates to one of the above (or emits nothing in the reserved-directive default arm).

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanYamlDirectiveIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (cAfterWS : Indexed.IxCursor input) (startPos : YamlPos) (hStart : startPos.offset ≤ cAfterWS.pos.offset) (s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanYamlDirectiveIx cAfterWS startPos hStart = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
                      source
                      📐 coverage

                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanDirectiveIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanDirectiveIx = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

                      §12j Per-scanner _preserves_prefix — document markers #

                      (Step 6d.1e.12c.1)

                      scanDocumentStartIx and scanDocumentEndIx unwind indents, then emit .documentStart / .documentEnd. Both compose through unwindIndentsIx_preserves_prefix (§6c) + emit_preserves_tokens_at (§5).

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanDocumentStartIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
                      s.scanDocumentStartIx.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanDocumentEndIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanDocumentEndIx = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

                      §12k Per-scanner _preserves_prefix — bounded scanners #

                      (Step 6d.1e.12c.1)

                      scanValueClearKeyIx leaves tokens unchanged (no setIfInBounds). scanValuePrepareIx / scanValueIx / scanFlowEntryIx overwrite positions at simpleKey.tokenIndex and simpleKey.tokenIndex + 1 when simpleKey.possible is true — so they preserve a prefix of length n only when n ≤ simpleKey.tokenIndex (the h_inv hypothesis). This bounded signature mirrors the legacy scanValuePrepare_preserves_prefix.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanValueClearKeyIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
                      s.scanValueClearKeyIx.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanValuePrepareIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (n : Nat) (h_n : n ≤ s.tokens.size) (h_inv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → n ≤ s.simpleKey.tokenIndex) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < n) :
                      s.scanValuePrepareIx.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanValueIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanValueIx = Except.ok s') (n : Nat) (h_n : n ≤ s.tokens.size) (h_inv : s.simpleKey.possible = true → n ≤ s.simpleKey.tokenIndex) (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < n) :
                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanFlowEntryIx_preserves_prefix {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_ok : s.scanFlowEntryIx = Except.ok s') (i : Nat) (h_bound : i < s.tokens.size) :
                      s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]

                      After Step 6f.0, scanFlowEntryIx no longer calls scanValuePrepareIx, so the prefix is preserved unconditionally (no h_inv simple-key boundary hypothesis needed).

                      §12l Dispatcher composition for AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx (Step 6d.1e.12c.2) #

                      Indexed twin of legacy saveSimpleKey_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInv through dispatchContent_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInv (lines 4430–4958 of Proofs/Production/ScannerPlainScalarValid.lean). Composes the §12g–12k _preserves_prefix substrate (Step 6d.1e.12c.1) with the §12c–12e _preserves_simpleKey/_preserves_simpleKeyStack/ _clears_simpleKey/_simpleKey_cleared/_simpleKey_restored/ _stack_pushed/_stack_popped facts and the per-scanner _tokens_size_le library to derive eight dispatcher-level _preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx theorems.

                      Branch shape:

                      • Mono scanners: AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx_mono.
                      • Cleared scanners: AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx_of_cleared_mono.
                      • Flow start/end: flowStart/flowEnd_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx helpers (this section) packaged with _simpleKey_cleared / _simpleKey_restored / _stack_pushed / _stack_popped.
                      • scanValueIx arm: AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx_of_cleared_current with the bounded §12k scanValueIx_preserves_prefix.
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.saveSimpleKeyIx_state_cases {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) :
                      s.saveSimpleKeyIx = s ∨ s.saveSimpleKeyIx = have __src := (s.emit YamlToken.placeholder).emit YamlToken.placeholder; { cursor := __src.cursor, indents := __src.indents, flowLevel := __src.flowLevel, tokens := __src.tokens, simpleKey := { possible := true, tokenIndex := s.tokens.size, cursor := ((s.emit YamlToken.placeholder).emit YamlToken.placeholder).cursor, endLine := ((s.emit YamlToken.placeholder).emit YamlToken.placeholder).cursor.pos.line }, simpleKeyStack := __src.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := __src.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := __src.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := __src.allowDirectives, seenYamlDirective := __src.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := __src.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := __src.documentEverStarted, flowStack := __src.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := __src.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := __src.definedAnchors, comments := __src.comments }

                      Full state-equation case enumeration of saveSimpleKeyIx: either identity (no-op branches) or push 2 placeholders + set simpleKey. Routes proofs around the let-bound state form that unfold + split produces (which omega/simp cannot reduce through).

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.saveSimpleKeyIx_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s.saveSimpleKeyIx
                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_preprocess_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (h_pre : s.scanNextTokenIx_preprocess = Except.ok (some (s', c))) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      scanNextTokenIx_preprocess preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. Composes skipToContentS (cursor-only update) with the conditional unwindIndentsIx and the final saveSimpleKeyIx.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchStructural_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchStructural c = Except.ok (some s')) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      scanNextTokenIx_dispatchStructural preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. Each of the three productions (scanDocumentStartIx, scanDocumentEndIx, scanDirectiveIx) either clears possible (vacuous) or preserves simpleKey+simpleKeyStack+prefix.

                      source
                      ⬇️ coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.flowStart_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_cleared : s'.simpleKey.possible = false) (h_pushed : s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.push s.simpleKey) (h_mono : s.tokens.size ≤ s'.tokens.size) (h_pref : ∀ (i : Nat) (hi : i < s.tokens.size), s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      Flow start preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. Pushes current key to stack, clears current. Indexed twin of legacy flowStart_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInv.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.flowEnd_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_restored : s'.simpleKey = s.simpleKeyStack.back?.getD { }) (h_popped : s'.simpleKeyStack = s.simpleKeyStack.pop) (h_mono : s.tokens.size ≤ s'.tokens.size) (h_pref : ∀ (i : Nat) (hi : i < s.tokens.size), s'.tokens[i] = s.tokens[i]) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      Flow end preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. Restores current key from stack top, pops stack. Indexed twin of legacy flowEnd_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInv.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchFlowIndicators_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchFlowIndicators c = Except.ok (some s')) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      scanNextTokenIx_dispatchFlowIndicators preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. Flow start ([, {) pushes current key + clears; flow end (], }) restores from top + pops; , (flow entry) clears + preserves stack.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchBlockIndicators_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchBlockIndicators c = Except.ok (some s')) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      scanNextTokenIx_dispatchBlockIndicators preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. scanBlockEntryIx is mono; scanKeyIx clears + preserves stack; scanValueIx clears + preserves stack but overwrites at sk positions (use bounded scanValueIx_preserves_prefix from §12k).

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (c : Char) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent c = Except.ok s') :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      scanNextTokenIx_dispatchContent preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. 7 productions: &/* (anchor/alias via scanAnchorOrAliasIx), ! (tag), |/> (block scalar), " (double-quoted), ' (single-quoted), plain scalar. All preserve simpleKey+ simpleKeyStack and add one token.

                      §13 AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx-threaded consumers (Step 6d.1e.12d) #

                      This section discharges the two §11i staging axioms (scanNextTokenIx_preprocess_preserves_SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx and scanNextTokenIx_preserves_SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx) by refactoring the §11i/§11j/§11k consumer chain to thread the full 4-tuple AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx instead of just SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx.

                      The §12l dispatcher composition gives us scanNextTokenIx_preprocess_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx and four dispatcher-level _preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx theorems. Using these, we compose scanNextTokenIx_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx (the new induction-step lemma for scanLoopIx), then re-derive the PSV / FlowNesting consumer theorems and the top-level theorems. Sites that only need the current-key conjunct project .1 of the 4-tuple.

                      Phase 3 closure after 12d: 0 staged axioms in IndexedScannerPlainScalarValid.lean (the two §11i axioms are discharged; the §7b/§7c/§8c/§8d/§8e scanner-side axioms remain on the ladder but are out of scope for 12d).

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.emit_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (tok : YamlToken) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx (s.emit tok)

                      emit tok preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx — emit leaves simpleKey/simpleKeyStack unchanged and grows tokens by one appended cell, so all four conjuncts transfer via AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx_mono.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.allowDirectives_update_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx (if s.allowDirectives = true then { cursor := s.cursor, indents := s.indents, flowLevel := s.flowLevel, tokens := s.tokens, simpleKey := s.simpleKey, simpleKeyStack := s.simpleKeyStack, simpleKeyAllowed := s.simpleKeyAllowed, needIndentCheck := s.needIndentCheck, allowDirectives := false, seenYamlDirective := s.seenYamlDirective, directivesPresent := s.directivesPresent, documentEverStarted := true, flowStack := s.flowStack, explicitKeyLine := s.explicitKeyLine, definedAnchors := s.definedAnchors, comments := s.comments } else s)

                      The if s.allowDirectives then ... else s record update preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. In both branches simpleKey, simpleKeyStack, and tokens are unchanged.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.streamStart_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx (input : String) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx ((Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx.mk' input).emit YamlToken.streamStart)

                      The initial state after .streamStart emit satisfies AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx: starts vacuous (simpleKey.possible = false, empty stack) and emit-preservation propagates through the streamStart token.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx = Except.ok (some s')) :
                      AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s'

                      scanNextTokenIx preserves AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx. Composes _preprocess_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx (§12l) with allowDirectives_update_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx and the four dispatcher-level _preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx theorems (§12l). Replaces the §11i staging axiom scanNextTokenIx_preserves_SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx (whose consumers now thread the full 4-tuple).

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_preserves_FlowContextPSVIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_old : WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx s.tokens) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx = Except.ok (some s')) :
                      WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx s'.tokens

                      Refactored §11i theorem (Step 6d.1e.12d): now threads AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx and projects .1 for the sub-dispatcher arms that still consume SimpleKeyPlaceholderInvIx.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanNextTokenIx_preserves_FlowNestingInvIx {input : String} (s s' : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanNextTokenIx = Except.ok (some s')) :
                      FlowNestingInvIx s'

                      Refactored §11i theorem (Step 6d.1e.12d): mirrors _FlowContextPSVIx above.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanLoopIx_preserves_FlowContextPSVIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (fuel : Nat) (tokens : Indexed.TokenStream input) (h_old : WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx s.tokens) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanLoopIx fuel = Except.ok tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.FlowContextPSVIx tokens

                      Refactored §11j theorem (Step 6d.1e.12d): threads AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx through the induction step. The recursive call uses scanNextTokenIx_preserves_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx (defined above) to maintain the invariant.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scanLoopIx_preserves_FlowNestingInvIx {input : String} (s : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx input) (fuel : Nat) (tokens : Indexed.TokenStream input) (h_fni : FlowNestingInvIx s) (h_akpi : AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx s) (h_ok : s.scanLoopIx fuel = Except.ok tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.flowNestingIx tokens tokens.size = 0

                      Refactored §11j theorem (Step 6d.1e.12d): mirrors the _FlowContextPSVIx form above.

                      source
                      📐 coverage
                      theorem L4YAML.Proofs.Indexed.ScannerPlainScalarValid.scan_flow_aware_psv_ix_axiom {input : String} (tokens : Indexed.TokenStream input) (h_scan : Scanner.Indexed.ScannerStateIx.scanIx input = Except.ok tokens) :
                      WellBehaved.FlowAwarePSVIx tokens

                      Refactored §11k top-level theorem (Step 6d.1e.12d): establishes AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx at the initial post-streamStart state via streamStart_AllKeysPlaceholderInvIx, then threads it through the refactored scanLoopIx_preserves_* chain.

                      source
                      📐 coverage

                      WellBehaved.FlowBracketsMatchedIx tokens

                      Refactored §11k top-level theorem (Step 6d.1e.12d): companion to scan_flow_aware_psv_ix_axiom.
